ticket.subject: please help
ticket.description:
Hi! The module has stopped working and won't print labels.
Please help me figure this out and fix the problem.
I've never had this problem before.

I don't understand why it's giving me these errors. The account is active.

--
Best Ragards
*COO: Vladimir Zhogov*
*LEYAKO OU*
*VAT: EE102153363*
Estonia, Tallinn
*FOLLOW US:*
www.leyakoreya.ee ( http://www.leyakoreya.ee/ )

To proceed, could you please confirm if this error is returned for only one shipment or is it frequently happening?

Thanks and regards,
Sibi

comments.body:
Customer has 2 queries:
1. The labels are failing with the error "Total Declared value exceeds customs value. Please update and try again"
Upon checking the custom value is passed as 125.39999999999999 and declared value is passed as 127.40

2. Order 258685 is failing with the error "Destination postal code missing or invalid." requested customer to cross check destinaton postal code and try again
comments.html_body:
Customer has 2 queries: 

  1. The labels are failing with the error "Total Declared value exceeds customs value. Please update and try again" 
    Upon checking the custom value is passed as 125.39999999999999 and declared value is passed as 127.40

    Raising l3 for this 

  2. Order 258685 is failing with the error "Destination postal code missing or invalid." requested customer to cross check destinaton postal code and try again

comments.body:
Hi Vladimir,

Thank you for your patience.

Regarding the label failure for Order #258403, we are currently checking this with our technical team. If this is an urgent shipment, we would request you to please fulfil the order outside of the app for now. We will update you as soon as we receive an update from our technical team.

Regarding Order #258685, the label generation is failing with the following error:
“Destination postal code missing or invalid.”
Could you please cross-check the destination postal code and try generating the label again?

You can also try recreating the shipment directly on the FedEx website to verify whether rates and shipment creation are working for that postal code.

Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Vladimir,
 
Thank you for your patience.
 
Regarding the label failure for Order #258403, we are currently checking this with our technical team. If this is an urgent shipment, we would request you to please fulfil the order outside of the app for now. We will update you as soon as we receive an update from our technical team.
 
Regarding Order #258685, the label generation is failing with the following error:
“Destination postal code missing or invalid.”
Could you please cross-check the destination postal code and try generating the label again?
 
You can also try recreating the shipment directly on the FedEx website to verify whether rates and shipment creation are working for that postal code.
 
Please let us know if you need any further assistance.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1779865248855479

WSS customer from Estonia is unable to generate the label, and it is failing with the error:
“Total Declared value exceeds customs value. Please update and try again.”

For Order 258403, upon checking the logs:
- Customs value is being passed as 127.39999999999999
- Declared value is being passed as 127.40



Customer is using FedEx carrier.Ideally, the customs value should also be rounded and passed as 127.40
I have attached the logs below for reference.
